
#######
BRIXS
#######

BRIXS is a python package for analysis of RIXS spectra.

.. The core of the BRIXS package is spectrum and image manipulation obtained in RIXS experiments.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2

   Installation <installation>
   Spectra manipulation <brixs>
   Dummy RIXS spctra generation <fake>

Examples
=========================

The functionality of the package is not fully explored by these examples.

.. toctree::
 :maxdepth: 2

  Example 1: Extract the spectrum of a dummy photon events list <example1>
  Example 2: Dealing with many spectra <example2>


See on GitHub
=================

Report issues on GitHub: https://github.com/cwgaldino/brixs
